---
title: R + GitHub Practice Session
---

:::{.callout-learning}
After completing this session, you will be able to:

-   bullet pointed learning objectives
:::


* set up group repo(s) in Delta org
* Set up Teams for github and add to group repo(s)
* create issues reflecting tasks to be completed
* assign issues to team members
* add tags to issues to track progress
* set up a project board to visualize workflow
